description: Darius Star ship roster — stats for the 5 playable fighter classes

spawnPrompts.veo: 16-bit retro sci-fi starfighter, sleek balanced design, cyan energy glow along wing edges, forward-swept wings, central cockpit, pixel art texture, dark space background, 256x256 sprite sheet frame
spawnPrompts.imagen: A 16-bit pixel art starfighter spaceship, balanced all-rounder design with cyan (#00ffff) energy highlights, forward-swept wings, centered cockpit canopy, metallic silver hull, retro arcade game sprite style on dark background

weapon.description: High rate of fire, low damage per shot. Quantity over quality.

specialAbility.name: Afterburner
specialAbility.description: 2x speed for 5s. Invulnerable to collision during boost.

spawnPrompts.veo: 16-bit retro sci-fi starfighter, ultra-streamlined needle design, green-teal energy trail, minimal wings, stretched fuselage for speed, pixel art texture, dark space background, 256x256 sprite sheet frame
spawnPrompts.imagen: A 16-bit pixel art speedster spaceship, needle-thin elongated design with teal (#00ffaa) afterburner glow, minimal wing profile, stretched fuselage built for velocity, retro arcade game sprite style on dark background

weapon.description: Devastating single shots. Long reload between blasts.

specialAbility.name: Aegis Protocol
specialAbility.description: Shield regenerates 8/s passively. Absorbs next 3 hits without damage.

spawnPrompts.veo: 16-bit retro sci-fi starfighter, massive armored bulk design, gold-yellow heavy plating, thick hull, dual cannon mounts, angular fortress-like silhouette, pixel art texture, dark space background, 256x256 sprite sheet frame
spawnPrompts.imagen: A 16-bit pixel art heavy tank spaceship, broad armored design with gold (#ffcc00) reinforced plating, thick angular hull, dual forward cannons, fortress-like silhouette, retro arcade game sprite style on dark background

weapon.description: 5-shot fan spread. Devastating at close range.

specialAbility.name: Overheat Barrage
specialAbility.description: Unlimited fire rate for 3s, then weapon disabled for 2s. Burst fire rewards skill.

spawnPrompts.veo: 16-bit retro sci-fi starfighter, aggressive wide-body design, red-pink hot-rod stripes, multiple weapon barrels, heat-vent wings, intimidating front profile, pixel art texture, dark space background, 256x256 sprite sheet frame
spawnPrompts.imagen: A 16-bit pixel art heavy firepower spaceship, wide aggressive design with red (#ff0055) hot-rod stripe accents, multiple visible weapon barrels, heat-vent panels along wings, intimidating combat stance, retro arcade game sprite style on dark background

weapon.description: Shots pass through enemies. One bullet, infinite penetration.

specialAbility.name: Phase Cloak
specialAbility.description: Invisible for 3s. Enemies can't target you. First shot out of cloak deals 3x damage.

spawnPrompts.veo: 16-bit retro sci-fi starfighter, low-profile stealth design, purple-violet phase-shift shimmer, angular radar-absorbing geometry, minimal engine signature, predatory stance, pixel art texture, dark space background, 256x256 sprite sheet frame
spawnPrompts.imagen: A 16-bit pixel art stealth spaceship, low-profile angular design with purple (#b026ff) phase-shift glow along edges, radar-absorbing geometric hull panels, minimal visible engine output, predatory crouched stance, retro arcade game sprite style on dark background
